mapper.sql: id, project_id, name, trigger_source, start_url, goal, device_preset, CAST(environment_jsonb AS TEXT) AS environment_jsonb, scenario_template_version_id, scenario_plan_schema_version, CAST(scenario_plan_jsonb AS TEXT) AS scenario_plan_jsonb, status, result_completeness, analysis_status, current_step_order, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_by, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT FROM test_run WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_run ( id, project_id, name, trigger_source, start_url, goal, device_preset, environment_jsonb, scenario_template_version_id, scenario_plan_schema_version, scenario_plan_jsonb, status, result_completeness, analysis_status, current_step_order, started_at, finished_at, failure_code, failure_message, created_by ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{projectId}, #{name}, #{triggerSource}, #{startUrl}, #{goal}, #{devicePreset}, CAST(#{environmentJson} AS jsonb), #{scenarioTemplateVersionId}, #{scenarioPlanSchemaVersion}, CAST(#{scenarioPlanJson} AS jsonb), #{status}, #{resultCompleteness}, #{analysisStatus}, #{currentStepOrder}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{failureCode}, #{failureMessage}, #{createdBy} )
INSERT INTO test_run_step ( id, run_id, step_order, step_key, step_name, stage, step_type, status ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{stepOrder}, #{stepKey}, #{stepName}, #{stage}, #{stepType}, #{status} )
mapper.update: UPDATE test_run SET status = #{nextStatus}, result_completeness = #{resultCompleteness}, started_at = #{startedAt}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run SET status = 'FAILED', result_completeness = #{resultCompleteness}, finished_at = #{finishedAt}, failure_code = #{failureCode}, failure_message = #{failureMessage}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND status = #{expectedStatus} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET current_step_order = #{currentStepOrder}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET latest_checkpoint_id = #{checkpointId}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE test_run SET latest_artifact_id = #{artifactId}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL

UPDATE test_run_step SET status = #{nextStatus}, started_at = COALESCE(#{startedAt}, started_at), finished_at = CASE WHEN #{finishedAt} IS NOT NULL THEN #{finishedAt} ELSE finished_at END, error_code = #{errorCode}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{stepId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO test_run_event ( id, run_id, step_id, event_type, source, payload_jsonb, occurred_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{runId}, #{stepId}, #{eventType}, #{source}, CAST(#{payloadJson} AS jsonb), #{occurredAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE test_run SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{runId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
